name: RunDrill
short_description: RunDrill is a 2D run game.You control the RunDrill, a machine that cracks rocks and breaks the ground to advance.Let's run through the vast subterranean world!
detailed_description:
■RunDrill is a 2D run game.
You control the RunDrill, a machine that cracks rocks and breaks the ground to advance.
Let's run through the vast subterranean world!

■Clear the stage and watch the story!
Clear the stage and the story will unfold.
The setting is a laboratory somewhere.
What will the three characters see when they go underground?

■Clear score is the player ranking!
The score for completing a stage is
It's going to be saved in the rankings on Steam!
Let's go for the fastest score!

■Q&A
●Can I stream gameplay or post videos with RunDrill?
Yes, you can stream gameplay and post videos with or without paid.
